content: Telegram/Discord karma-economy bots (KarmaBot, @PlusMinusKarmaBot, Reto, Karma Reborn) share a table-stakes set: award points to others (reply +1 or emoji react), revoke/undo, per-member balance, leaderboard, no-self-vote anti-abuse, admin reset/init, and help. Differentiators seen: streaks (DiscordStreak), daily karma claims, all-time vs 30-day stats, starboard/best-of, milestone/monetary conversion. Award verb is usually reply-with-+1 or emoji reaction.
